about-me-section.intro-text: Hi, I'm Nico Leiteritz! I love building clean, efficient software. Inspired by the rapid evolution of technology, I enjoy turning complex ideas into structured, user-friendly digital experiences.
about-me-section.location-text: Based in Germany, I am open to both in-house office roles and remote collaborations, or even relocating for the right opportunity.
about-me-section.mindset-text: I thrive on continuous learning, constantly mastering new frameworks to stay ahead and write efficient, maintainable code.
about-me-section.puzzle-text: I view challenges as puzzles, always aiming for the most scalable and elegant solution possible.

skills-overview.description-text: I build modern web apps, focusing on Angular and TypeScript. My expertise includes data-driven development, integrating REST-APIs and Supabase. By prioritizing clean code and intuitive design, I ensure my projects are both performant and accessible.
skills-overview.cta-text: I am genuinely passionate about exploring new technologies. If your project requires a tool outside my current stack, I am highly motivated to quickly adapt and master new systems to grow with your challenges.
skills-overview.tooltip-learning: I also have a special interest in learning:

projects-showcase.description-text: Explore a selection of my work here - Interact with projects to see my skills in action.
projects-showcase.description: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.

colleague-feedback.placeholder: Feedback is coming soon – currently working on exciting new projects!

contact-area.info-text: Don't hesitate to reach out! Tell me about your project and let's figure out how I can bring real value to your team as a developer.
contact-area.info-call-to-action: Need a Fullstack developer? Let's talk!
contact-area.modal-success-text: Your message has been sent. I will get back to you shortly.

contact-area.error-message: What do you need to develop?
